creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
2011/2/6 Martin Wilke <miwi@freebsd.org>:
> On 02/06/2011 03:10, Olivier Duchateau wrote:
>>
>> The following reply was made to PR ports/154516; it has been noted by
>> GNATS.
>>
>> From: Olivier Duchateau<duchateau.olivier@gmail.com>
>> To: bug-followup@freebsd.org
>> Cc:
>> Subject: Re: ports/154516: [UPDATE] net-im/pino to 0.2.11, now runs with
>> vala 0.10.x
>> Date: Sat, 5 Feb 2011 19:40:37 +0100
>>
>> =A0Hoops, I believe, this port is still broken.
>
> exactly, i have the same error and can't login, u want to look for fix,
> or u want me to close it?

You can close it.

However, I can login, even post a message (I only tested Identi.ca),
but all other features are broken.
